lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust, deep scratches, and multiple dents. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the upholstery and visible damage. Mechanical systems require major repairs and are currently unreliable.
The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior shows heavy wear. There are known mechanical issues that require repair.

Get ready to drive away in a vehicle that is truly in showroom condition! This car is absolutely pristine, looking and performing exactly like it did when it was brand new. It has been meticulously cared for and is in flawless shape inside and out. It’s a perfect choice for anyone who wants a like-new experience!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been reliably maintained. The exterior paint retains a strong finish, though close inspection reveals a few minor rock chips on the front bumper and a small scratch near the rear wheel well. Inside, the upholstery is clean with only light wear on the driver's seat bolster, and all electronic features and climate controls are fully functional. The engine runs smoothly, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining. It is a solid, dependable choice for a buyer looking for a well-kept car.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, ideally for parts or as a major restoration project. It is not currently roadworthy and will require a trailer for transport. The engine runs very roughly with significant oil and coolant leaks, and the transmission exhibits slipping. Visually, the car has extensive rust along the rocker panels, multiple large dents, and peeling clear coat. Inside, the upholstery is heavily torn, several interior trim pieces are missing, and the electrical system is unreliable, with the radio and power windows currently non-functional.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards and preserved in showroom condition. This example exhibits flawless paintwork and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Mechanically impeccable and rigorously inspected, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. We invite serious inquiries to experience this peerless motorcar.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home! This car is in absolutely stunning shape—it seriously looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, kept it spotless, and it drives like an absolute dream. You’ve gotta see it in person to believe how pristine it is! It's perfect for anyone who wants that 'new car' feel without the dealership headache. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered icon, maintained to exacting standards. The 3.2L high-revving straight-six features a meticulously synchronized individual throttle body setup and a fully overhauled dual-VANOS system for optimal cam phasing. Power is delivered through a precise six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, with documented subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension geometry utilizing OEM bushings. Finished in concours-level paint with a pristine interior, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance and mechanical integrity.
Flawless exterior. Interior like new. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents.

This pristine example of automotive excellence has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since day one, representing a true collector-grade find. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like finish with absolutely no chips, swirls, or imperfections, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather is supple and entirely free of creases or wear, while the original carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since new. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history that documents its pampered life. It has never been driven in inclement weather, and the undercarriage is as spotless as the bodywork. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that truly feels, looks, and drives like it just rolled off the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior profile and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Meticulously preserved and mechanically beyond reproach, this motorcar offers an uncompromising experience for the most discerning enthusiast. A rare acquisition for those who demand peerless quality.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and offered in pristine, mint condition. This motorcar represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer, featuring an impeccable aesthetic profile and a mechanical pedigree that remains beyond reproach. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a history of superior stewardship. We invite you to experience the unparalleled refinement of a vehicle that truly stands in a class of its own.

Hey there! I'm so excited to share this absolute gem with you. Honestly, it's in such incredible shape that you'd swear it just left the dealership yesterday! It's been my pride and joy, meticulously cared for and kept in pristine condition inside and out. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next adventure with a new owner who will love it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out if you want to come take a look!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example of the S54-powered legend. Featuring the high-revving 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies, the powertrain delivers linear thrust and a signature metallic rasp. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile, short-throw engagement, paired with a perfectly calibrated variable M differential lock. This specimen has undergone meticulous preventative maintenance, including VANOS bulletproofing and rear subframe reinforcement. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, and the suspension geometry is strictly factory-spec, ensuring the surgical handling and communicative steering feedback these cars are renowned for. A truly pristine, collector-quality driver's machine for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records available. Inspections welcome.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features original factory paint with a deep, mirror-like luster, entirely free of stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with zero creasing, and every electronic feature—from the advanced infotainment suite to the dual-zone climate control—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a meticulous history of preventative maintenance and exceptionally low mileage. It has been exclusively garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment, preserving the chassis and engine bay in a state of cleanliness rarely seen on the secondary market. For the discerning buyer seeking a turn-key example that looks, smells, and drives like a brand-new vehicle, this is the definitive choice.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen exhibits a pristine exterior finish and an interior that remains in factory-fresh condition. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, its mechanical integrity is absolute. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and pedigree.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which stands as a definitive testament to automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, having been preserved with meticulous care and an unwavering commitment to its original integrity. Its aesthetic and mechanical states are beyond reproach, offering a level of refinement that will satisfy the most discerning collector. Every detail reflects a heritage of premium ownership, ensuring that this vehicle is not merely a mode of transport, but a significant acquisition for the serious enthusiast seeking unrivaled quality.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty has been pampered since day one and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's in pristine condition inside and out—no scratches, no spills, just pure driving bliss. You won't find another one this clean! I've taken such good care of it, and I'm looking for a new owner who will love it just as much as I have. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This 997.2 Carrera S represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. The 3.8L DFI flat-six delivers linear power delivery with zero bore scoring, supported by a meticulously maintained integrated dry-sump system. The G97/05
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No defects.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for 'mint' condition. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, showcasing a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. The interior remains in showroom state, featuring premium leather that still carries its original scent, with absolutely no signs of wear on the bolsters or controls. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; every service has been performed ahead of schedule by certified technicians, and the engine bay is clean enough to eat off of. From the pristine undercarriage to the untouched alloy wheels, every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the highest collector-grade standards. This is not just a used car; it is a time capsule for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This specimen exhibits an aesthetic and mechanical integrity indistinguishable from its original showroom delivery. With an unblemished history and exhaustive service documentation, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been curated to the highest standards of mechanical and aesthetic excellence. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a rigorous commitment to preservation. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned market, offering the performance and presence of a brand-new machine. Experience the pinnacle of automotive integrity.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—it’s been my absolute pride and joy. It looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor, and it honestly drives even better. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been totally pampered and loved, this is the one for you! Let's get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

Offered is an impeccably maintained specimen featuring a high-revving, naturally aspirated flat-six powerplant mated to a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. This example boasts a factory-spec mechanical limited-slip differential and an active suspension management system for optimized lateral load distribution. The braking hardware utilizes six-piston monobloc calipers over cross-drilled rotors, showing no signs of thermal stress or glazing. With a documented service history confirming peak compression across all cylinders and a chassis devoid of structural oxidation, this vehicle delivers an uncompromised, analog driving experience. The exterior retains its original high-depth luster, reflecting its meticulous preservation and climate-controlled storage history.
Mint condition. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Original paint. Smoke-free interior.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines 'showroom condition.' This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and shows zero signs of wear. The exterior paint retains its original deep luster with a professional ceramic coating, free of any chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no creasing, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a documented full-service history. The engine bay is spotless, and the drive is tight, quiet, and responsive. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a benchmark example that looks and performs like it just rolled off the assembly line.

We are proud to present an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior cabin that remains in showroom state. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, this unit offers a superlative driving experience for the most discerning collector. An acquisition of this caliber is a rare opportunity for those who demand nothing less than perfection.
